purpose: Standardize how user-observed hardware validation closes a retrofit PBE change record.
whenRequired: The change reads from or writes to real hardware.
Build or automated tests cannot prove device-level behavior.
The user explicitly needs real-device confirmation before acceptance.

smart51TestExample.observedBehavior: The SMART-51 Factory test field displays correctly after actual GetConfig.
smart51TestExample.excludedBehaviorStillExcluded: Set/save/load behavior remains outside the requested scope.

guardrails: Do not convert build pass into hardware pass.
Do not infer hardware pass without a user/device observation.
If excluded behavior was not checked, keep that part unknown rather than claiming full acceptance.
Hardware pass closes only the confirmed scope, not future broader behavior.
